name: NVIDIA
report:

headlines: Intel And NVIDIA May Team Up On Monster Serpent Lake CPUs With RTX Graphics

name: AMD
report:

name: Intel

name: Microsoft

headlines: Microsoft AI Copilot enterprise adoption grows

name: Alphabet

name: Bitcoin

name: Ethereum

name: Solana
report:

VERDICT VENDRE/ÉVITER: Indicateurs techniques et sentiment négatif dominent.
